title: L@muw'el #3927
definition:
Lemuel = "for God"

 1) the name of an unknown king to whom his mother addressed the
    prudential maxims contained in some of the Proverbs
    1a) might be same as king Solomon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Lemuel = "for God"

 1) the name of an unknown king to whom his mother addressed the
    prudential maxims contained in some of the Proverbs
